dependencies: compatible framework handoff or test submission

publicly accessible materials reviewed do not yet expose a frozen reciprocal test package

scope: external framework registry and testing posture
dependencies: TA-14-controlled or mutually agreed execution environment

disputes.summary: TA-14 publicly claims parent or complete-route status; StegVerse records the claim but does not treat scope, chronology, or vocabulary as independent proof of containment.
